file_contents./home/gitadmin/db_backup.sh:
#!/bin/bash
# Gitea MySQL backup script
# Runs nightly via root crontab at 02:00
# Author: gitadmin
# Last modified: 2026-02-28

set -euo pipefail

BACKUP_DIR="/var/backups/gitea-mysql"
DATE=$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)
RETENTION_DAYS=14
LOG_FILE="/var/log/gitea-backup.log"
DB_HOST="127.0.0.1"
DB_USER="gitea_backup"
DB_PASS="B@ckup_DB_2025!secure"
DB_NAME="gitea"

log_msg() {
    echo "[$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] $1" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"
}

mkdir -p "$BACKUP_DIR"

log_msg "Starting MySQL backup for database: $DB_NAME"

if ! mysqldump -h "$DB_HOST" -u "$DB_USER" -p"$DB_PASS" \
    --single-transaction --quick --lock-tables=false \
    "$DB_NAME" | gzip > "$BACKUP_DIR/gitea_${DATE}.sql.gz" 2>>"$LOG_FILE"; then
    log_msg "ERROR: mysqldump failed with exit code $?"
    echo "Gitea DB backup FAILED on $(hostname) at $(date)" | mail -s "[ALERT] Gitea Backup Failed" gitadmin@internal.corp
    exit 1
fi

BACKUP_SIZE=$(du -sh "$BACKUP_DIR/gitea_${DATE}.sql.gz" | awk '{print $1}')
log_msg "Backup completed: gitea_${DATE}.sql.gz ($BACKUP_SIZE)"

# Also backup Gitea repositories
log_msg "Backing up Gitea repositories..."
tar czf "$BACKUP_DIR/repos_${DATE}.tar.gz" -C /home/git gitea-repositories 2>>"$LOG_FILE"
log_msg "Repository backup completed"

# Cleanup old backups
find "$BACKUP_DIR" -name "*.gz" -mtime +${RETENTION_DAYS} -delete
log_msg "Cleaned up backups older than ${RETENTION_DAYS} days"

log_msg "All backup tasks completed successfully"
